briefs.title: Tobacco and Vapour Warning Display Fine Updated Under BC Offence Act, Effective April 2026
briefs.summary: BC is updating the fine amount for failing to display required health warnings for tobacco and vapour products. The change takes effect April 1, 2026 and applies to businesses that sell these products.
briefs.action_required: Review your tobacco and vapour product warning displays before April 1, 2026 to ensure full compliance.

key_dates.label: BC updated tobacco/vapour warning display fine takes effect
